name: network-scanner
description: Scan a list of target hosts for open ports. Returns per-host port status and optional service banners. Intended for authorized security assessments.

TARGETS.description: List of target hostnames or IP addresses to scan (max 256)

PORTS.description: Comma-separated list of ports or ranges to scan (e.g. '22,80,443' or '8000-8100')

TIMEOUT_MS.description: Connection timeout per port in milliseconds (default: 1000)

BANNER_GRAB.description: Whether to attempt to read service banners from open ports (default: false)

setup_instructions.title: Ensure you have authorization
setup_instructions.detail: Only scan networks and hosts you are authorized to test. Unauthorized scanning may violate laws and terms of service.

setup_instructions.title: Configure scan targets
setup_instructions.detail: Set TARGETS to an array of IP addresses or hostnames. Keep the list under 256 entries to stay within limits.

setup_instructions.title: Set port range
setup_instructions.detail: Set PORTS to a comma-separated list of ports (e.g. '22,80,443,8080') or ranges (e.g. '1-1024').
